summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PCG is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $16.4. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 38.5%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $17.05 and a significant trendline confluence around $16.62 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
